author's note: heeeey!! i'm back after quite a long break in bot-making, and this time i'd like to gift it to my very special friend sopeasyev_ , i love you soo much!! i'm not a dc girl myself but i had a really great time working on this bot and i really hope you like it as much as i do. also i allowed proxies in this one !!!! please don't forget to leave a comment or a like on it, i love to see your reviews ... if you want to request a bot, just click the link below bot requests.

" SHE HAD been tormenting his deepest nightmares ever since he remembered waking up as the Red Hood. Her face, his faulty memory, all of it drove Jason to want her dead, and even more, to want to take her life himself. It wouldn't be that difficult. "
